conversations.title: What's the total area of my polygons?

messages.content: What's the total area of my polygons?

I can't calculate that directly. I don't have access to your loaded layers or their properties in this chat environment. You'll need to use the GIS application's tools to calculate the area of your polygons.

I still can't calculate the total area of your polygons. My capabilities are limited to the tools I have been given: `web_search`, `geocode`, `fly_to`, `highlight_features`, and `create_artifact`. I don't have access to your map's loaded layers or the ability to perform spatial analysis like calculating areas. You'll need to use the GIS application's built-in tools for that.

https://github.com/datameet/Municipal_Spatial_Data/blob/master/Chandigarh/Chandigarh_Wards.geojson
can you fetch this and place this

I can load it, but I need a **direct (raw) GeoJSON URL**. GitHub “blob” links often don’t return the file contents in a way the map loader can read.

Please paste either:
1) the **raw** link (usually: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/.../Chandigarh_Wards.geojson`), or  
2) the actual file contents (or a smaller excerpt), or  
3) confirm the repo path and I’ll give you the exact raw URL to use.

Once you provide the raw URL, I’ll add it as a new GeoJSON layer (e.g., **“Chandigarh Wards”**) and display it on the map.
I've moved the map to India.
I can't change the basemap directly. My tools do not support that functionality.
